subcodes.title: Words to Florence Khan spoken in June 1906
subcodes.first_line: If by punishing is meant striking, no, this is very bad for the child. Children should be trained through love. But if parents show them the utmost love without requiring of them good behavior
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @parents and children; youth; families, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @education of children; moral education
